problem_21.natural_language: Every bounded monotone sequence of real numbers converges.
problem_21.lean:
theorem tendsto_of_monotone_bddAbove (u : ℕ → ℝ) (hu_mono : Monotone u) (hu_bdd : BddAbove (Set.range u)) :
    ∃ l : ℝ, Filter.Tendsto u Filter.atTop (nhds l)
problem_21.lean_proof:
by
  use ⨆ i, u i
  apply tendsto_atTop_ciSup
  exact hu_mono
  exact hu_bdd
